headline: Work injury claim Preparation Checklist — North Salt Lake
articleBody:
Work injury claim Preparation Checklist for North Salt Lake Clients

Before your Work injury claim appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
